statics.description: As long as there are four or more lore counters among Sagas you control, CARDNAME has hexproof and indestructible.

triggers.description: Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control resolves, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Saga card. Put that onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. This ability triggers only once each turn.
